verses.text: They compassed Mount Seir many days, then turned north. Wandering. The years of delay passed.
They compassed Mount Seir many days, then turned north. Wandering. The years of delay passed.
They compassed Mount Seir many days, then turned north. Wandering. The years of delay passed.
They must not meddle with Edom, their brethren. Edom. God gave Esau his land.
They must not meddle with Edom, their brethren. Edom. God gave Esau his land.
They must not meddle with Edom, their brethren. Edom. God gave Esau his land.

They passed Moab, whom God gave Ar. Moab. God assigns lands to nations.
They passed Moab, whom God gave Ar. Moab. God assigns lands to nations.
They passed Moab, whom God gave Ar. Moab. God assigns lands to nations.
They passed Moab, whom God gave Ar. Moab. God assigns lands to nations.

They crossed the brook Zered; the old generation had died. Passed away. The faithless were gone.
They crossed the brook Zered; the old generation had died. Passed away. The faithless were gone.
They crossed the brook Zered; the old generation had died. Passed away. The faithless were gone.
They must not vex Ammon, God's gift to Lot's sons. Ammon. God keeps His word to all.
They must not vex Ammon, God's gift to Lot's sons. Ammon. God keeps His word to all.
They must not vex Ammon, God's gift to Lot's sons. Ammon. God keeps His word to all.
They must not vex Ammon, God's gift to Lot's sons. Ammon. God keeps His word to all.
A note tells of the giants who once dwelt in those lands. Giants. God removes nations as He wills.
A note tells of the giants who once dwelt in those lands. Giants. God removes nations as He wills.

A note tells of the giants who once dwelt in those lands. Giants. God removes nations as He wills.
God bids them possess Sihon's land and begin the conquest. Begin. The dread of Israel spreads.
God bids them possess Sihon's land and begin the conquest. Begin. The dread of Israel spreads.
Moses asks passage; Sihon refuses, for God hardened him. Hardened. God uses even refusal.
Moses asks passage; Sihon refuses, for God hardened him. Hardened. God uses even refusal.

Moses asks passage; Sihon refuses, for God hardened him. Hardened. God uses even refusal.
God delivers Sihon, and Israel smites him. Victory. The first king east of Jordan falls.
God delivers Sihon, and Israel smites him. Victory. The first king east of Jordan falls.
God delivers Sihon, and Israel smites him. Victory. The first king east of Jordan falls.
They take all his cities, sparing only what God forbade. Conquest. The land is given.
